title: Math 101
description: This mod introduces a new block called the Math Station - where you can do arithmetic problems to get points and get good at math.
body:
This mod introduces a new block called the Math Station - where you can do arithmetic problems to get points (and more importantly get good at math).

These points can be spent in the shop for cool items like diamonds, golden apples etc., but most notably a custom armour set called the Ingral Armor
